description_long: This restaurant is a rectangular, two-story commercial building with a flat roof that features an open-air dining area. The rooftop is furnished with multiple tables and chairs, as well as a distinct orange seating section, suggesting a designated lounge or VIP area. The exterior walls are painted in a light blue and white color scheme, with large windows on the upper and lower floors providing natural light to the interior. An attached single-story annex extends from one side, likely serving as an entrance or additional dining space. The building's facade is simple, with minimal ornamentation and a modern, utilitarian design. The rooftop terrace is enclosed by a metal railing, enhancing safety while maintaining an open atmosphere.
description: A modern, light blue and white restaurant with a rooftop dining terrace, large windows, and a simple rectangular form. The building features an attached annex and outdoor seating on the roof.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rooftop terrace with tables and chairs, and the attached annex extending from the main building.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the annex and the full length of the rooftop seating area, with visible windows on the main building.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the light blue facade, multiple windows, and the rooftop terrace layout.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the main entrance area, the orange lounge section on the rooftop, and the building's window arrangement.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is characterized by smooth, light blue walls with white trim and large rectangular windows on both floors. The design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a flat roof bordered by a simple metal railing. The attached annex is similarly styled, maintaining the cohesive modern look.
